info.title: ClubOS API
info.description:
OpenAPI documentation for the ClubOS backend. Authentication is handled via Google OAuth2. 

### Login Flow:
1. Navigate to `/oauth2/authorization/google` in your browser.
2. Upon successful login and email verification, the server returns a JSON with a `token`.
3. Use this token in the `Authorization` header as `Bearer <token>` for all other requests.
Note: Only emails registered in the database are allowed to login.

tags.name: Panel APIs
tags.description: Governance endpoints used by panel members for onboarding, promotions, and department-transfer workflows.

tags.name: General User APIs
tags.description: Shared endpoints not tied to a single governance role. Authentication is still a placeholder and will later move into dedicated auth controllers.

tags.name: Member APIs
tags.description: Endpoints used by club members to submit work, place bids on ownership-based tasks, and inspect their remaining bidding capacity.

tags.name: Lead APIs
tags.description: Endpoints used by department leads to assign tasks, review submissions, and resolve ownership assignments.

post.description: Temporary login endpoint used before the dedicated authentication module is introduced.

404.description: User was not found or credentials were rejected by the current placeholder implementation.

post.summary: Bulk onboard members into a department
post.description: Imports a batch of members into the given department, generates their initial passwords, and returns the credentials that must be distributed securely.
Creates a new submission for a task or replaces an existing non-approved submission. Ownership-based tasks can only be submitted by assigned owners.

404.description: Member or task was not found.

409.description: Submission is not allowed in the current state, such as editing an approved submission or submitting an ownership task without ownership.

post.summary: Place a bid on an ownership-based task
post.description: Creates a pending bid for a member. The bid immediately reserves tokens from the member's remaining bidding balance.

404.description: Member or ownership task was not found.

409.description: Bidding is closed, the member already has a bid, or there are not enough remaining tokens.

patch.description: Replaces the token amount for an existing pending bid. Increasing a bid consumes additional remaining tokens; lowering a bid releases tokens back to the member.

404.description: Member, ownership task, or existing bid was not found.

409.description: Bid cannot be updated in the current state, such as when bidding is closed or the member lacks enough remaining tokens.

post.description: Assigns an ownership-based task to a department, including the number of owners to choose and the bidding deadline.

400.description: Task points, number of owners, or deadlines are invalid.

post.description: Assigns a standard task to a department with the specified point value and optional deadline.

400.description: Task points or payload values are invalid.

patch.description: Promotes a member to department lead and demotes the current lead back to member within the same department.

parameters.name: memberId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the member to promote.

404.description: Member or department was not found.

patch.summary: Transfer a member to another department
patch.description: Moves a member to a new department without rewriting historical task or ownership records from earlier departments.

parameters.name: memberId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the member to transfer.

parameters.name: departmentId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the destination department.

400.description: Transfer request is invalid, such as requesting the same department.

404.description: Member or target department was not found.

patch.description: Approves or rejects a submitted task. The same endpoint is also used to correct an earlier review decision.

400.description: Review status or payload is invalid.

409.description: The review cannot be completed in the current state, such as approving an ownership task for a non-owner.

patch.summary: Directly assign owners before bidding closes
patch.description: Lets a lead bypass open bidding and assign the owners explicitly before the bidding deadline. The task points are automatically reduced to 60 percent of the original points.

200.description: Owners assigned directly and bidding closed for the task.

400.description: Owner list or task data is invalid.

404.description: Ownership task or one of the requested members was not found.

409.description: The ownership assignment cannot be changed because bidding is already closed or the deadline has passed.

get.summary: Get remaining bid tokens for a member
get.description: Returns the number of tokens the member can still commit across currently unresolved ownership-task bids.
Returns the list of member submissions that have been made for the specified task.

email.description: Email address used by the user to log in.

rawPassword.description: Raw password provided by the user.

role.description: Declared role of the user. This field is currently informational in the placeholder login flow.

ApiErrorResponse.description: Standard error response returned when a request cannot be completed.

status.description: HTTP status code returned by the API.

path.description: Request path that produced the error.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the error response was generated.

jwt.description: Placeholder JWT returned by the current login implementation.

role.description: Resolved role of the authenticated user.

BulkMemberImportDto.description: Request payload used to onboard multiple members into a department in one operation.

departmentId.description: Unique identifier of the department into which the members should be imported.

MemberImportDto.description: Single member entry used in a bulk onboarding request.

registerNumber.description: Register number used as a unique academic identifier.

email.description: Email address used for onboarding and login.

MemberCredentialsDto.description: Credential bundle returned after successful member onboarding.

password.description: Generated initial password that the member should change on first login.

TaskSubmissionDto.description: Request payload used by a member to submit proof of work for a task.

memberId.description: Unique identifier of the submitting member.

taskId.description: Unique identifier of the task being submitted.

proofOfSubmission.description: Link, note, or textual proof showing the work that was completed.

BidPlacementDto.description: Request payload used to create or update a member's bid on an ownership-based task.

memberId.description: Unique identifier of the member placing the bid.

taskId.description: Unique identifier of the ownership-based task.

tokensBidded.description: Number of tokens the member wants to commit to the bid.

OwnershipTaskAssignmentDto.description: Request payload used by a lead to create an ownership-based task.

points.description: Base points available for the task before any direct-assignment reduction.

deptId.description: Unique identifier of the department receiving the task.

deadline.description: Optional final completion deadline for the task.

biddingDeadline.description: Date-time after which automatic bid resolution should run.

numberOfOwners.description: Number of owners that should be selected for this task.

GeneralTaskAssignmentDto.description: Request payload used by a lead to assign a general department task.

points.description: Total points assigned to the task.

deptId.description: Unique identifier of the department receiving the task.

deadline.description: Optional deadline by which the task should be completed.

TaskReviewDto.description: Request payload used by a lead to approve or reject a submission.

taskId.description: Unique identifier of the task being reviewed.

memberId.description: Unique identifier of the member whose submission is being reviewed.

status.description: Review outcome. Only APPROVED or REJECTED are valid review values.

remarks.description: Optional remarks left by the lead during review.
remarks.example: Good work. Please tighten the final copy next time.

OwnershipTaskDirectAssignmentDto.description: Request payload used by a lead to directly assign owners before bidding closes.

taskId.description: Unique identifier of the ownership-based task.

items.description: Unique identifier of a member who should become an owner.

GetSubmissionsDto.description: Response payload containing all recorded submissions for a task.

taskId.description: Unique identifier of the task whose submissions were fetched.

submissions.description: List of submissions currently recorded for the task.

SubmissionsDto.description: A single recorded submission for a task.

memberId.description: Unique identifier of the member who submitted the work.

bearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT token here to authorize requests.
bearerAuth.name: bearerAuth
